basicDetails.implementingAgency: Department Of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Government Of Meghalaya

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Agriculture Engineering (Mechanical) Scheme” is a State Plan Scheme, which is implemented by the Department of Agriculture &amp; Farmers’ Welfare, Government of Meghalaya. The objective of the scheme is to provide agricultural machinery such as power tillers/bulldozers/tractors etc. on hiring at subsidised rate.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
> **Pattern of Assistance:**


- Providing a 60% subsidy for the purchase of improved farm machinery and equipment (Proposed for Power Tiller and Diesel Water Pumpset).

> **Type of Assistance and Entitlement (If any):**


- Subsidy for hiring of farm machinery and equipment.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide agricultural machinery such as power tillers/ bulldozers/ tractors etc. on hiring at subsidised rate.

children.text: The “Agriculture Engineering (Mechanical) Scheme” is a State Plan Scheme, which is implemented by the Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Government of Meghalaya. The objective of the scheme is to provide agricultural machinery such as power tillers/bulldozers/tractors etc. on hiring at subsidised rate.
Pattern of Assistance:
Providing a 60% subsidy for the purchase of improved farm machinery and equipment (Proposed for Power Tiller and Diesel Water Pumpset).
Type of Assistance and Entitlement (If any):
Subsidy for hiring of farm machinery and equipment.
Application Process:
Step 01:
The eligible bonafide farmer can apply/write an application on plain paper.
Step 02:
Along with the application, attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Step 03:
Submit the duly filled and signed application along with the relevant documents at the nearest office of the Agriculture Development Officer of a CD Block/Agriculture Circle.
Mode of Selection of Beneficiary(s):
The bonafide farmers shall be selected on a first come first serve basis.
Whom to Contact:
District Agriculture Officers of the concerned districts.
Sub-divisional Officers of the concerned sub-divisions.
Agriculture Development Officers of the concerned Community and Rural Development Blocks.
Assistant Agriculture Engineer (Mechanical) of the concerned districts.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Application Process:**

**Step 01:** The eligible bonafide farmer can apply/write an application on plain paper.
**Step 02:** Along with the application, attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
**Step 03:** Submit the duly filled and signed application along with the relevant documents at the nearest office of the Agriculture Development Officer of a CD Block/Agriculture Circle.
> **Mode of Selection of Beneficiary(s):**

The bonafide farmers shall be selected on a first come first serve basis.
> **Whom to Contact:**


   1. District Agriculture Officers of the concerned districts.
   1. Sub-divisional Officers of the concerned sub-divisions.
   1. Agriculture Development Officers of the concerned Community and Rural Development Blocks.
   1. Assistant Agriculture Engineer (Mechanical) of the concerned districts.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be a resident of Meghalaya.
1. The applicant should be a bonafide farmer engaged in agriculture.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Meghalaya.
The applicant should be a bonafide farmer engaged in agriculture.
